# Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Code change (`src/`) — bug fix, feature, refactor in a service
- [ ] Chart change (`chart/`) — deployment values, image tags, replicas, resources
- [ ] Sureops contract (`​.sureops/`) — service-map or runbook update (sureops staff only)
- [ ] Sync from upstream / template (auto-generated by `customer-sync.yml` or `upstream-sync.yml`)
- [ ] Other

## Test plan

<!-- How was this validated? -->

- [ ] CI passes (build-images, chart-only)
- [ ] Local helm template renders cleanly
- [ ] Affected service tested locally / in PR preview env

## Sureops-bot PRs

If this PR was opened by `sureops-bot`, it's the result of sureops's
diagnosis or fix-PR agents proposing a change in response to an incident.
Review the diff carefully before merging:

- Code patches against `src/{service}/` are real fixes the agent identified;
  apply your normal code-review judgment
- Chart bumps from the build-images workflow (`[skip ci]`) are routine;
  safe to fast-forward

For questions, contact sureops support via the Slack channel set up at
provisioning time (`#uat-{your-slug}-incidents`).
